Client-side utility

It'sMeOxy: Legal Case Briefer for law students.

Paste full case text or a court opinion below, then click "Parse Case Text" to generate readable brief sections entirely in your browser.

Quick brief preview

Clean structure for sustained reading

The live parser runs entirely in your browser—no server, no API keys. Use highlight mode to emphasize sections while studying.

Controls

No brief

Download or print this page to create study sheets. The layout is optimized for clean reading and export.

Name of Case

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".

FACTS & BACKGROUND

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".

ISSUE

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".

RULE / DOCTRINE

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".

APPLICATION / ANALYSIS

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".

CONCLUSION / RULING

This section will show parsed content after you click "Parse Case Text".
